News.SubTitle: Initial Release!
News.Title: Town of Us: Mira v1.0.0
Text: The initial release!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.0.0>TOU Mira v1.0.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
THIS MOD IS IN PUBLIC BETA. EXPECT BUGS AND ISSUES.

News.SubTitle: Many Bugfixes!
News.Title: Town of Us: Mira v1.0.1
Text: Update now Available!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.0.1>TOU Mira v1.0.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Detective report settings are now toggled correctly
- Haunter can open Decontam doors again!
- Investigator footprints are hidden in comms sabotage
- Prosecutor's prosecution is always anonymous
- Prosecutor can no longer pros the skip button
- If you are jailed and your Jailor dies mid-meeting, your messages are not displaced into public chat
- Altruist revives dead lovers properly
- Imitator Mayor no longer reveals themselves to the crew as Imitator
- Imitator role change rpc has been fixed, shouldn't result in errors anymore
- Medium arrows are removed after a meeting
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes</size>
- Inquisitor checks if all their targets have died to determine if the game will end or not
- Inquisitor Inquire uses no longer drain if someone was picked during the round already
- Inquisitor report no longer duplicates the last role
- Phantom will spawn correctly if Haunter failed to spawn
- Phantom can open Decontam doors again!
- Soul Collected players will now hide in comms correctly
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes</size>
- A player that's destined to become Traitor no longer holds the game if they are dead
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes</size>
- Celebrity no longer sends a report message when they are exiled
- In Freeplay, removing the Shy modifier no longer keeps your player or pet invisible
- Multitasker no longer makes security minigames transparent
- Lovers die together and revive together correctly
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes</size>
- Spamming to join into a lobby is no longer possible and will not queue a join attempt repeatedly
- Zooming in freeplay no longer shows broken shadows, instead opting to hide them
- Messages with 0 characters will no longer be parsed through private chats
- Long mode no longer trips up the game
<size=105%>Improvements</size>
- The "/setname" command now has a limit of 12 characters and removes tmp text
- Lovers chatbox is hidden in the exile screen
- Colorblind text is now always capitalized in all menus
- Tawny and Gold color names have been swapped around
- More errors have been cleared up, so there will be less filler in logs and the game will be smoother
- Wiki hides the host player UI in the lobby
<size=105%>Additions</size>
- Jailee Can Use Public Chat toggle
- New Colors!
- Long Horse April Fools (Long and Long Horse have issues with cosmetics, be aware of this)
<size=105%>Removals</size>
- "/sethost" command is being removed as it just causes trouble

News.SubTitle: Bugfixes and Improvements galore!
News.Title: Town of Us: Mira v1.0.2
Text: Update now Available!
This update includes numerous bugfixes and improvements, and should hopefully clear up the recent crashes happening on Epic Games. As always, if you encounter a bug, feel free to make a bug report!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.0.2>TOU Mira v1.0.2 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Investigator footprints hide in comms properly and no longer error out
- Deputy camped notification should be sent to the correct player now
- Sheriff correct kills are checked correctly
- Sheriff no longer continues the game on misfire
- "Jailee Can't Use Public Chat" option has been fixed
- Prosecutor continues game
- Infinite Engineer vent uses no longer shows uses as "0"
- Imitator should no longer be able to change roles if they have turned vamp or traitor
- Engineer/Plumber can no longer access vents through walls
- Amnesiac and Imitator no longer interfere when selecting roles
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Pestilence has impostor vision now
- Hacking a player should no longer affect meeting or ejection screen kills
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Hypnotised players should no longer be able to see player names
- Dead traitor should no longer be able to change their role
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Shy no longer applies onto Phantom/Haunter
- Egotist can no longer be traitor
- Egotist cannot leave the game if lovers are alive
- Egotists no longer show correct or incorrect kills
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Vent offset no longer shows a timer
- If impostors cannot see each others' roles but know who they are, they can see each other in the team reveal properly
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Cleric now tells you if the player you cleansed had no negative effects
- Task count is shown on the Taskbar tab itself
- Faction/Team modifiers are shown below role description in the role reveal screen
- Satellite now shows dead bodies on the map
- Tracker arrow delay and Shy options can go down to zero seconds
- End Game Timer options can go up to 30 minutes
- Sheriff Shoot, Button Barry, and Satellite Broadcast can be used immediately in Freeplay regardless of Round One settings
- Meeting kill animations are instant when there's less than 6 players
- End Game checks were moved around and should fix crashes on Epic Games
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- End Game Timer now allows switching between "Game Draw" and "Impostor Win" on the timer ending
- Scavenger now gets a HnS-like pop-up for their next target
- Amnesiac gives feedback and will notify you when trying to remember Amnesiac
- Better Airship options
- Arrow Style option: Toggle between the default look, the arrow with a dark glow, a color glow, or use the old task arrows if you wish
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Inquisitor's "Stall Game" option is now only applicable in 1v1s or 2v1s
- Assassin's "Guess Spy / Investigator Modifier" options are now merged into one option that includes all Crewmate Utility Modifiers in general
- Just like in TOUR, all button timers will now pause in vents (besides Glitch's buttons)
- Imitator can no longer pick up Politician or Mayor (because they can stay as those roles forever)

News.SubTitle: Road to TOU Mira v1.1.0!
News.Title: Town of Us: Mira v1.0.5
Text: Update now Available!
This update has a handful of changes, improvements, and especially bugfixes compared to the v1.0.2 release. We are aware of bugs regarding Mini, Phantom/Haunter, and a few others.

The original intention was to release v1.1.0 as a full-on update, but due to the amount of bugs players have been dealing with for the past weeks, we've decided to split off this release and the content update as v1.0.5 and v1.1.0 respectively! The wait will be more than justified with the new roles intended to be implemented, just bare with us.
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.0.5>TOU Mira v1.0.5 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Rainbow Tracker arrows will be rainbow instead of black
- Mayor is no longer able to become Traitor
- Politician reveal no longer works when only one crewmate is campaigned
- Prosecutor no longer ends meetings instantly
- Oracle Blessing stops assassin guessing
- Footprint intervals are now in time, not distance
- Footprints are layered correctly
- If specified, trapper uses are reset properly after each round
- If the "Jailee Can Use Public Chat" option is disabled, the Jailee can speak properly in the private chatbox
- If a Deputy camps a player in a 1v2, and the camped player dies, Deputy continues the game correctly
- Deputies no longer hold onto the killer information from the previous round.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Amnesiac takes away unique roles correctly again
- Plaguebearer infections do not spread from meeting kills.
- Executioner and Fairy have better checks for their targets dying.
- If an Amnesiac was a target for an Inquisitor, and they pick up the role of said Inquisitor, their role will be removed from the list of heretics.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Hypnotist can no longer hypnotize once Mass Hysteria is in action
- If the Hypnotist dies or disconnects, then the hypnosis wears off
- Egotist and Executioner Target should no longer be able to become Traitor
- Traitor spawn is fixed
- Traitor's cooldown no longer drops down to 10 seconds when changing their role
- Bombs no longer trigger within meetings
- Bombs will appear for teammates correctly
- Miner vents are fixed in Weapons (Polus) and can no longer be placed inside of doors
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Lover death checks run on the host, removing the need for two separate death checks.
- If a Scavenger has a lover, they will no longer target them.
- It is no longer possible to have a neutral lover if the setting is disabled.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Rainbow text color in the host panel and the chat pop-ups are rainbow instead of black now.
- Death Valley task is now accounted for correctly, fixes red map and the task being inaccessible.
- It is no longer possible to get Traitor, Lovers, Pestilence, or a killing target as Fairy when the respective options are set to 0%.
- Hidden shields should no longer appear in the modifiers hud.
- The offset button no longer shows a comms symbol when comms are off.
- Setting the amount of impostors via role list overrides vanilla settings now.
- If you get shot out of a meeting, your buttons should no longer show up
- Game will no longer end within the exile screen (which affected Prosecutor in a 1v1)
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Task progress now shifts from red, to yellow, to green.
- Modifier assignment is now shuffled instead of being alphabetical.
- There is now a tally for the amount of tabs in the cosmetics menu.
- In meetings, certain roles will show information, such as Doomsayer and Vigi seeing guesses needed/available, or for prosecutor
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Lovers can still kill each other by default, but this can be changed via a toggle.
- Cause of death is shown on the endscreen and in-game
- Added an option for meeting deaths to add a certain amount of time to the vote timer
- Added back "Fairy Target Knows" option
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Jester Haunt, Executioner Torment, and Phantom Spook no longer appear on round start; instead, a new button will appear to haunt/torment/spook a player of your choice.
- Morphling Sample has no cooldown anymore
- Escapist Mark has no cooldown anymore
- Investigator Footprints are now closer to how TOUR Footprints appear and act
- Eclipsed and Flashed players can use their abilities again, but may not report bodies
- Double Shot is now an Assailant Modifier, applying to Impostors as well as Neutral Killers
<size=105%>Removals:</size>
- Impostors both being lovers can no longer happen as it simply life-links impostors to no benefit.

News.SubTitle: The Impostors grow in power...
News.Title: The First Content Update!
Text: Update now Available!
This update has a few bugfixes under its belt, but most importantly, adds three new roles!
The new Impostor roles are Ambusher and Ambassador, and the new crew role is Mirrorcaster, the descriptions for these roles are listed under the Additions segment of the changelog.
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.1.0>TOU Mira v1.1.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Imitator checks should no longer prevent them from selecting a new role
- Warden will add a second to the cooldown of whatever ability is used on a fortified player to prevent brute force attempts
- Lookout can see the roles that interacted with their dead targets again
- Prosecutor uses are used correctly and no longer force a prosecution twice in a row
- Veteran will properly add alerts uses via tasks to prevent ending the game
- Mayor reveal is now visually correct and shows the hands correctly
- Medic Shield, Cleric Barrier, and Warden Fort will be removed on disconnection properly
- Detective / Medic report options being at 0 seconds will no longer stop any information
- Transporter now transports players correctly, no more desync
- If the Snitch reveals neutral killers, they now show the role color
- If a blessed player is swapped, the swapped target will still be ejected
- Transporting a body next to a wall no longer places it outside of bounds (PR #51) (Nix-main)
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Fix Alive Neutral Ghost on Jester win
- Jester Haunt, Phantom Spook, and Executioner Torment ignore shields correctly now
- Jester Haunt, Phantom Spook, and Executioner Torment cannot be opened multiple times anymore
- Amnesiac will correctly know who their target is as Fairy or Executioner
- Amnesiac will remove douses/infection when picking up Arsonist/Plaguebearer
- Pestilence transform checks will run locally for the pb, not everyone in general to avoid desync or anything of that degree
- Amnesiac will no longer become an OG Vampire unless they took the role of the OG Vamp
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- If an Undertaker dies while dragging a body, the body will be let go automatically
- Abilities can be used in Eclipse and while flashed now (bodies are not reportable in grenade flash though, only eclipse)
- Scavenger targets are no longer given during a meeting
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Shy ghosts are no longer invisible, but their hat stays translucent
- Mini and Giant can climb ladders correctly now without getting stuck
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Zipline and Ladder work for Phantom/Haunter once again
- Impostor Streak Reduction no longer triggers the 1 impostor bug
- Egotist, Fairy, and Vampire cannot become Haunter/Phantom now. Winning Doom, Exe, Jester, and Inquisitor cannot become Phantom either.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- New Role Buckets: Impostor Power and Impostor Special
- Added a Maximum Medic Shield Uses setting
- Game Timer can now be paused at certain times within meetings

- New Crewmate Protective Role: The Mirrorcaster!
This role can absorb direct attacks from players, and unleash them onto others!

- New Impostor Power Role: The Ambassador!
This role can retrain themselves or other impostors to roles of the same caliber (note: Role does not play correctly with FFA Impostor mode at the moment)

- New Impostor Killing Role: The Ambusher!
This role can select one player, track them, and then ambush the player closest to them. If they kill the player, then they will take the player's body with them.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Dying to Veteran now says "Attacked", dying to Deputy says "Blasted", and dying to Vampire says "Bitten"
- Support for other MiraAPI mods has been improved across the board (this does not affect you if you only play Town of Us Mira standalone)
- Plumber now swaps between 3 barricade sprites
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Torch is no longer immune to Eclipsal
- Mercenary and Fairy can win with their targets from alliance modifiers
- Plumber barricades will now only stay for a set amount of rounds (customizable, can be infinite)

News.SubTitle: Haunter actually haunts again!
News.Title: Bundle of Bugfixes
Text: Update now Available!
This update has purely bugfixes this time around.
In other news, translation system is being worked on, so TOU Mira will be localized to multiple languages very soon!
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.1.1>TOU Mira v1.1.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Detective no longer throws null errors, which broke ghost roles in the process.
- Blessed guessers no longer stay alive from misguessing.
- Haunter calculations actually work properly
- Transporter can no longer throw players out of bounds, again. (PR #55) (Nix-main)
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Extra checks are added with Haunt/Torment/Spook menus to not linger around and allow double kills
- Jester no longer overrides their cause of death when Prosecuted.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Ambusher cannot drop bodies into the wall anymore. (PR #53) (Nix-main)
- Ambusher and Scavenger Arrows are removed correctly when a meeting starts.
- Ambusher has extra checks to remove the animation when a meeting starts or if the ambusher is killed mid-ambush.
- Ambassador may only retrain themselves in FFA Impostor Mode now.
- Solo killing settings for Blackmailer and Undertaker now work correctly.
- Dragging a body between vents as Undertaker is now instant.
- If the Swooper has limited uses, then they cannot go under 0 uses.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Lover death checks are run on the dead lover's end instead of everyone else's end, fixing lovers not dying together properly.
- Telepath cannot spawn with FFA Impostor Mode anymore.
- When Prosecutor fails and dies, they will not announce their death if they're a Celebrity.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Target assignment is now done in a specific order, so ego exe targets, ego traitor, exe with lover target should no longer be possible.
- The In-Game Wiki shows Pestilence and Mayor entries properly again.
- The Guess Menu checks for role chance AND amount correctly.
- If Executioner and Guardian Angel turn into disabled roles on target death, then said roles can be guessed.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Bomb Round One Option has been added for Bomber. (PR #54) (Nix-main)
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- The subtitle for the Win Screen with nobody winning is now renamed to "Game Draw!" instead of "Nobody Wins!" as Neutral Evils can still win.
- Main Menu has been slightly adjusted visually, major change is the April Fools Selector now being moved into the main UI.
- Redundant April Fools check was removed. (PR #57) (Astral)
- Added chat tags for roles and modifiers by doing #soul-collector or &celebrity for example. (PR #58) (Chipseq)
- Keybinds are far more responsive now.
- Doomsayer report shows vanilla roles/non tou roles under an outsider category.
- Doomsayer report shows clickable wiki entries for role reports.
- Celebrity message shows clickable wiki entry for their killer's role.
- Camo Comms should no longer be prone to crashing.

News.SubTitle: Snitches Get Stitches
News.Title: Another Pack Of Bugfixes + Starlight Support
Text: THIS UPDATE REQUIRES YOU TO BE ON AMONG US v17.0.0!
This update has bugfixes, QoL improvements, Spectator support, AND Android support via Starlight! If you encounter issues via Starlight, please let us know!

Starting this update, Mira will be getting localized into numerous languages! As of now, there is partial translation for Simplified Chinese, Dutch, French, German, Italian, Russian, and Spanish in-game, with more soon to come.
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.2.0>TOU Mira v1.2.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- If the Lookout disconnects or gets converted, their feedback will no longer be shown to others in the chat.
- Snitch is revealed properly to the Traitor as intended.
- Traitor will always see the Snitch regardless of settings, but Snitch can only see Traitor based on specific settings.
- Tracker and Engineer get task uses properly.
- Mirrorcaster can no longer Unleash onto the player that they protect at the same time.
- Sheriff can kill Ambassador without misfiring (bad checks)
- Prosecutor button is no longer hidden when the skip button is hidden.
- Jailee is no longer in Jail if the Jailor is converted.
- Mayor no longer trips up Traitor checks from sending repetitive requests to all players.
- Fixing Comms as Engineer no longer uses up two charges.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Amnesiac Inquisitor can no longer target themselves.
- Phantom, Executioner, and Jester ghost kills are now run through a more direct method to force a murder at all costs.
- Glitch player names are no longer revealed during Camo Comms after un-mimicking.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Traitor can no longer vent as a ghost.
- Hypnotist applies the same body type to all players, and clears properly without breaking.
- Swooper player names are no longer revealed during Camo Comms.
- Morphling player names are no longer revealed during Camo Comms after unmorphing.
- Ambusher can no longer get outed when they are taking bodies away.
- When the Ambusher's victim is revived while their body is taken away, the ambusher will no longer softlock.
- Miner vents are fully disabled from other roles if they aren't visible.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Celebrity Report no longer gets parsed incorrectly.
- When Spooked by a Phantom, the Celebrity shows their cause of death as Spooked properly.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Haunter, Phantom, and Snitch now ignore Sabotage and information on the task list (which is why there was some miscounting, I blame Slayed)
- There are now checks to prevent votes on dead players or votes happening from dead players
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Chat Tags now italicize on hover. (PR #65) (Chipseq)
- Controllers on the Main Menu can now select the April Fools Toggle
- Chat is now hidden from recently killed players.
- Your abilities can no longer be triggered when typing in lovers chat.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Nearly complete Chinese translations, as well as partial translation for Dutch, French, German, Russian, and Spanish.
- Players can now spectate in games by running "/spec" in their chat.
- It is now possible to change what ranges of buttons are affected by the starting cooldown, if any.
- New Client Option: Hide Vanilla Wiki Entries Toggle (this shows up in the sidebar rather than the current tou client options menu).

News.SubTitle: Spectator & Wiki Fixes
News.Title: Hotfix Update
Text: This update resolves a few issues from the last update, but we are still working on fixing the bigger problems with kills. This should be resolved soon enough.
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.2.1>TOU Mira v1.2.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Localization Updates:</size>
- Impostor Abilities are nearly fully ready for translations.
- Doomsayer now adds localization changes correctly.
<size=105%>Wiki Bugfixes:</size>
- Fixed wiki entries for Diseased, Lovers, Bait, Mini, Rotting, Satellite, Amnesiac, and Plumber.
- Vanilla wiki entries get properly localized to your active language.
- Inquisitor Report entries can now be clicked to open their wiki entries.
- Vanilla wiki entries for Viper and Detective no longer appear as "STRMISS"
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Causes of death are now changed properly.
- Spectator information is updated as soon as a new client joins the lobby, hiding Spectators from the meeting.
- Spectator can no longer become Phantom.

News.SubTitle: Do I smell...smoke?
News.Title: The Chef and Spellslinging-Slasher join the frey!
Text: This update adds a lot more localization for roles, which apply to everything except options, color names, and meeting abilities.
A new neutral role enters the fray: The Chef! This was a community-made suggestion by CraftR on the Tou Discord, under the Neutral Outlier bucket.
A new impostor role also joins the ranks: The Spellslinger! This role was PR'ed by Loonie over on Github, and is an Impostor Power role.
Thanks to the community testing out beta builds, we've finally cracked down on the major issues plaguing the mod, and we're immensely thankful for that.
Again, the Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.3.0>TOU Mira v1.3.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Vigilante no longer wastes a use while guessing.
- If a Prosecutor is punished and dies as a Celebrity, their death is no longer displayed.
- Jailor no longer errors out from certain kills.
- Hunter Retribution should appear for all clients properly now.
- Medic will no longer trigger the shield if the kill button isn't usable.
- Mirrorcaster will no longer trigger the mirror if the kill button isn't usable.
- When an Amnesiac/Imitator becomes snitch, their progress automatically updates.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- If an Executioner's target becomes a Vampire, they will no longer be able to end the game, but will still win.
- Mercenary can no longer become Phantom if they bribed a player, or had their role taken by an Amnesiac.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Blackmailed victims are prevented from voting correctly.
- Undertaker properly drops dead bodies.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Aftermath will now properly trigger abilities as intended.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Wiki appears in front of ALL ui elements now.
- First Round Shield will no longer trigger if the kill button isn't usable.
- FFA Impostor Mode now hides impostor names from the chat.
- Guess counts should no longer be counted in the main kill counter for the summary.
- Haunter and Phantom no longer appear camouflaged during comms.
- When a player disconnects, anyone who voted for them should no longer be stuck without a vote.
- Client-sided murders should no longer be an issue now.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Mirrorcaster now has four types of information it can display based on the attack.
- Inquisitor is no longer a Neutral Evil, but rather a Neutral Outlier alongside the new neutral role.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Toggle Spectators options is under General Options.
- Inquisitor Vanquish Round One toggle has been added
- Rich Presence on Discord now shows the mod icon.
- New Neutral Buckets: Neutral Wildcard (Non-Killing Neutrals) and Neutral Special (Neutral Killing and Outlier)

- New Neutral Outlier Role: The Chef!
This role takes the dead bodies of players and feeds them to others, which all fulfills their quota to leave in victory!

- New Impostor Power Role: The Spellslinger!
This role hexes players to then set off a hex bomb, in which the crew will need to get rid of the Spellslinger or finish their tasks against the hex clock.

News.SubTitle: Just an API change
News.Title: Update For AU v17.0.1
Text: This update purely changes the MiraAPI version we use, and requires a fresh install for Among Us v17.0.1
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.3.1>TOU Mira v1.3.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★

News.SubTitle: Hide and Shriek with this update!
News.Title: Did someone say... feast?
Text: This release includes a good amount of changes for all players to enjoy, and some that may not be taken very lightly. The main changes are as follows:
- Modded Hide and Seek is now available with 4 roles and 5 modifiers.
- Seer, Altruist, and Egotist have been reworked, so feel free to check them out!
- Some TOU roles have been renamed, to allow vanilla roles to be alongside them. We know this is a bit of a tough pill to swallow, but only four roles are affected by this change!
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/v1.4.0>TOU Mira v1.4.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Hunter will no longer get their retribution on their last voted when Prosecuted.
- Politician checks now round up rather than round down.
- Mayor reveal no longer loops when opening the guess menu or wiki.
- Mirrorcaster's attack information is now displayed properly.
- Oracle now has Neutral Outlier Settings.
- Lookout can no longer see basic Impostor/Crewmate Ghosts interact with their target
- Seer checks neutral outliers properly
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:
- Amne Politician can campaign properly
- Survivor no longer survives death from scatter with their vest
- Werewolf cooldown is no longer locked to 5 seconds
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:
- Ambusher animation loads properly for all players.
- Spellslinger is no longer outed in the meeting.
- Miner vents in Submerged now use the regular vent type rather than the pipe vent.
- Traitor no longer spawns without cooldowns.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Fix the lack of Neutral Outliers causing Wildcard Role buckets to spawn basic Crewmates.
- Screen Flashes (from the likes of Medic, Warden, etc) now work during sabotages.
- When going from a build that has Level Impostor or Submerged to one without them, the host menu will no longer softlock the game.
- Any players that become Phantom will no longer hide their kill counters in the end game summary.
- Dummies in Freeplay/Practice Mode will always get a role without erroring out.
- Submerged finally works on Tou: Mira and no longer breaks cooldowns.
- Game End Timer no longer instantly ends the game if the previous match ended from time running out.
- Buttons can no longer have negative cooldowns.
- It is no longer possible to have multiple button modifiers with the same keybind
- Skeld doors on other maps works again
- Discord Rich Presence shows mod count properly
- Vanilla roles are properly displayed alongside other tou roles,
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Kill buttons and vent buttons are now organized in such a way to match vanilla and TOUR respectively.
- All maps now have offsets for Short Tasks, Long Tasks, and Cooldowns under the Better Map options.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Vanilla engineer can no longer be used in TOU Mira
- TOU Detective, Tracker, Guardian Angel, and Phantom have been renamed to Forensic, Sonar, Fairy, and Spectre.
- Vanilla Viper has been moved into the Impostor Killing alignment.,
- Altruist by default sacrifices themselves when reviving, and can be changed to be like old Altruist or even older Altruist.
- Egotist now speeds up players and lowers cooldowns the longer they stay alive, which is configurable.
- Mercenary will protect players from attacks and gain double the profit by default.
- Seer has been reworked into its Town of Salem counterpart, comparing two separate players.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- It is now possible to switch between Vanilla role assignment, Role List, and Min/Max Neutral List
- Modded Hide and Seek is now possible!
- New Vanilla Tweak Options: Walk to Medscan Toggle, Hidden Pets, Removal Of Pets Upon Body Cleanse
- New Alliance Modifier: Crewpostor! A Crewpostor is a crewmate that works solely for the impostors, and becomes traitor upon their deaths.
- New options were added for independent configuration of dead players.
- New options for Camouflage Comms: Camouflage Kill Screens in Comms, Hide Player Size, and Hide Player Speed.
- New option for All Maps: Specified Door Types, including No Doors and Random Doors
- Added dlekS into the randomized map list and in the game settings window.
- Nearly all sabotage countdowns are now configurable.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Vanilla Viper now has the cause of death "Disintegrated"
- Celebrity death message is now formatted as a list
- Dying to Submerged Oxygen now shows "Suffocated" as cause of death
- Mayor sees all players they campaigned after reveal
- Freeplay now has three buttons available for enhanced testing
- Localization for options is now being applied throughout the mod.

News.SubTitle: Rejoice for a better vent system!
News.Title: The Mira mod mods Mira!
Text: This release includes many critical bugfixes that were plaguing the mod upon the Thanksgiving update. On top of that, there are new options and improvements to make up for the wait.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.4.1>TOU Mira v1.4.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Jailor no longer shows a kill screen upon execution
- Seer no longer gains additional uses from unfinished player comparisons
- Imitator can no longer become basic Impostor or Survivor
- Vanilla Detective notes can be properly used in meetings (PR #99) (Rewalo)
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Spectre now spawns consistently
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Fix Eclipsal option name
- Traitor can no longer spawn like a basic impostor role
- Double undertakers can no longer grab the same body
<size=105%>Gamemode Bugfixes:</size>
- Hide and Seek modifiers no longer appear in guessing menus
- Classic Mode roles and modifiers can no longer spawn in HnS
- All game keybinds are moved to the right hand side, no longer blocking vent uses in HnS
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Neutral Wildcard will no longer cause incorrect neutral role spawns
- April fools bugs no longer appear when joining a lobby
- Fix keybinds bypassing button checks from shields
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Cached roles (such as Imitator or Traitor) will be displayed at the top of the wiki
- Stricter anticheat improvements (PR #96) (Rewalo)
- Chat messages can now include most unicode characters and can be up to 300 characters long (PR #95) (Rewalo)
- The chat now displays secondary text bubbles for Lover, Jailor, Impostor, and Vampire chat
- Lover chat is now a pink tint to make it stand out
- Hunter has configurable task options
- Engineer now has very configurable Vent, Fix, and task settings
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- All intro blurbs have been improved and simplified
- Crewpostor can no longer be a Jailor, Politician, Snitch, or Swapper
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- New Local Settings: Grenadier Flash Color & End Game Summary Message style
- Better Polus Setting: Move Bathroom vent to Medbay
- Better Mira HQ Setting: Better Vent Network
- New Keybinds added for zooming in and out
- New option: First Round Death Indicator
- New command: /roles (PR #95) (Rewalo)
- New HnS Modifier: Transporter

News.SubTitle: Crewmates and Impostor Powers Collide!
News.Title: Finally, an equal playing field
Text: This release includes 5 new roles in total, alongside two negative impostor modifiers.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.0>TOU Mira v1.5.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Prosecutor's use is no longer wasted when their selection dies mid-meeting.
- Jailor uses are no longer removed 2 times in a row.
- Veteran no longer loses instantly in a 1v1 when on their last alert.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Amne Executioner and Fairy will see their target properly.
- Doomsayer guesses now appear properly instead of appearing as kills.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Traitor can be guessed properly again.
- Undertaker's Drag/Drop button no longer locks up after consecutive games.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Crewpostor is treated as a regular impostor and no longer loses when only crewmates remain.
- Disperse no longer breaks on Ladders or Platforms.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- First round death indicator no longer exposes morphed players.
- Vanilla roles are now properly clickable in chats to open their wiki entries.
- Epic Games can use Practice mode again.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- The private chatboxes are no longer toggled via separate buttons, but rather within the chat itself.
- Local Settings have been split up into two tabs, and the button slider has moved under MiraAPI Settings.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Morphing into a player with the First Death Shield will show a fake shield.
- Guesser Menu now allows you to search for role and modifiers for ease of use.
- Most cooldowns can now go from 5 seconds all the way to 2 minutes.
- Options for Sheriff, Vampire, Oracle, and Vigilante are compressed within the wiki.
- New artwork has been added and some old artwork has been cleaned up.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Better Airship Option: No Ladder Cooldown.
- Mystic Option: Show Death Pop-Up.
- Arsonist Option: Impostor Vision. (Parity Change from TOUR)
- Altruist Option: Kill on Revive Start.
- Grenadier Option: Flash During Sabotage. (Parity Change from TOUR)
- Host-Only Option: Toggle Lobby No-Clip.
- New Impostor Roles: Parasite and Puppeteer.
- New Crewmate Roles: Monarch, Sentry, and Time Lord.
- New Impostor Modifiers: Circumvent and Deadly Quota.
- Hosts can now add a "LobbyRules.txt" file next to the mod to show their rules in-game (PR #108) (Neil)
- New Client Options: Merged/Split Chats, Set Framerate

News.SubTitle: Oh, and a Time Lord too.
News.Title: Less bugs, more Impostors!
Text: This release includes bugfixes primarily for Time Lord, Parasite/Puppeteer, and chat issues.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.1>TOU Mira v1.5.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Time Lord now accounts for more multi-step tasks.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Amnesiac arrows no longer linger when a body is cleaned
- Pestilence should no longer be able to die due to desync.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Deadly Quota properly checks win conditions.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Options should no longer desync.
- Team Chat should no longer hide messages due to bugs.
- Enter, Backspace, and certain Chinese characters can be used in chat properly again.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- The mod will no longer run on BepInEx versions earlier than 738 due to critical bugs with IL2CPP.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Lobby rules are automatically sent to players by default upon joining.
- More role icons have been improved and redrawn.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Deadly Quota Option: Meeting Kills Count Towards Quota.
- Vanilla Tweaks Option: Cooldown Pause in Tasks and Panels.
- Local Settings: Zoom in Lobby/Practice.

News.Title: More Miner Bugfixes
News.SubTitle: No, not Miner itself.
Text: This release includes bugfixes for a few minor issues.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.2>TOU Mira v1.5.2 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Ghost Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Spectre's role tab now displays the information properly
- Ghostwalker roles should appear to spawn properly for all players

<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Upper and Lower Deck is no longer broken visually on Submerged (PR #117) (jukixyo)
- Cooldown Pause in Panels option is no longer duplicated
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- The Main Menu now displays the Discord Server and Source Code links next to the Fools Mode toggle
<size=105%>Additions:</size>

- Host Option: Multiplayer Freeplay Mode

- Better LI Options: Reactor/Oxygen/Mix-Up Duration Changes, No Ladder Cooldown Toggle

News.Title: Less Roaches in the Vents
News.SubTitle: Less bugs and more fixes!
Text: This release includes bugfixes for a handful of things, and also improves anticheat a bit.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.3>TOU Mira v1.5.3 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Veteran should no longer crash from trying to defend and retaliating against Pestilence
- Imitator should properly show the crewmate variants of roles
- Mystic can see the location of viper bodies properly now
- Sentry now shows up via Doomsayer hints
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Arsonist should no longer break when igniting a shielded player
- Amnesiac can no longer be its own Executioner/Fairy target, preventing game crashes.
- Glitch Hack no longer breaks kills when triggered by a basic button press
- Pestilence announcement now works properly
- Spectre should no longer cause issues with win conditions
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Role changing mid animation no longer softlocks the player
- Player checks are cached, resulting in better performance
- Kill animations should no longer break from corrupted memory.
- Kills should no longer desync
- Pseudo-spectators should no longer appear in meetings.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Medium is no longer a Support role, and is now an Investigative role
- Rotting now has the base game Viper animation (and isn't removed from the player list)
- Neutrals and Egotist now have a grey map
- Impostors and Crewpostor always have a red map now
- Some game options have moved into the Game Mechanics category
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Meeting abilities now have text that can be translated.
- The wiki now shows colors based on alignment rather than actual role color.
- Alliance modifiers now display a notification explaining the player's objective.
- The mod now displays a new smooth splash screen
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- All neutrals have objective text in their task list, just like Impostors.
- Veteran can now be told if an attack was attempted on them in the meeting (Optional)
- Amnesiac by default picks up faction modifiers
<size=105%>Changes for Developers:</size>
- The Player Reveal system has been changed a bit. Use BaseRevealModifier instead!
- MeetingMenu abilities can now have text, but this is optional for mod developers.

News.Title: Critical Bugfixes and Improvements
News.SubTitle: You waste our time, we waste yours.
Text: This release is focused on fighting against hackers who continuously barge into lobbies to cause chaos. Normally our updates aren't this soon but we felt the need to address this immediately.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.4>TOU Mira v1.5.4 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Mirrorcaster no longer bypasses their cooldowns.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Soul Collected bodies are now removed upon revive.
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Deadly Quota's guess setting is checked correctly again.
- Taskmaster no longer activates when the player is a Vampire/Traitor
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Deaths should no longer desync under race conditions with meetings.
- Kills can no longer be triggered in the lobby from cheat clients.
- Role icons will no longer appear behind text in the role tab.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Visual Theme toggles for Skeld, Mira, and Polus can now be adjusted
- Add Required Mods setting for hosts
<size=105%>Known Issues:</size>
- Sentry's portable cameras are completely broken on Starlight

News.Title: A new Mira update? This can't be!
News.SubTitle: - Shakespeare, probably.
Text: This release changes a LOT. As a result, this has taken longer than expected, and we are fairly confident that most of the mod is now bug free. For the sake of everything though, v1.6.0 will not be released until we clear up most of the bugs that we can find.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.5.9>TOU Mira v1.5.9 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Critical Changes:</size>
- All Role List buckets are reset! The options are now unable to be affected by the addition of extra role buckets.
- Kills are now confirmed by the host before they are visible for everyone else. This means that there are no more death desyncs.
<size=105%>Main Changes:</size>
- Medium has been fully reworked now.
- A new Impostor Power role has been added: Herbalist!
- The wiki now has a way to view game settings and includes a Terminology page.
- Ghost roles are now in an Afterlife category rather than Crew Investigative or Neutral Evil.
- Vanilla roles have their own colors now, and are fully integrated into the mod.
<size=105%>Known Bugs:</size>
- Operative and Sentry Portable cameras are unusable on Android.
- Some roles (such as Hunter) are known to have issues on Android, for reasons unknown to us.
- Private chats are invisible by players killed mid-meeting.
- Neutral Wildcard may duplicate the amount of each neutral present if any selected slots are wildcards.
<size=105%>Possibly Fixed Bugs:</size>
- Medic Shield is no longer ignored if it is supposed to break.
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Monarch's Round One setting is properly checked.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Amnesiac properly removes their "win condition" information from the task tab.
- Doomsayer causes of death appear consistently now.
- Spectre no longer prevents Neutral Evils from winning.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Hypnotist no longer breaks Mix-Up or kill animations
- Ambusher is no longer caught by Investigator footprints
- Traitor is no longer unguessable if Crewpostor is disabled.
- Players controlled by a Puppeteer can no longer no-clip when they're too close to the wall
- Grenadier's flash no longer prevents abilities from being used. (besides reports)
<size=105%>Modifier Bugfixes:</size>
- Lovers can no longer chat when under control
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Ghostwalker roles spawn properly on Submerged
- Players are no longer kicked out of vents that there were no longer present in.
- Multi-kills from Bomber and Arsonist no longer break when one of the players is shielded
- Negative rounds will no longer appear in the Game Summary.
- Skeld decor settings are now checked properly.
- dlekS will no longer cause the Create Game Menu to freeze.
- "Airship" is no longer shown when "dlekS" is actually selected.
- Better Skeld's Vent Network connects the Navigation vent to Weapons properly.
<size=105%>Local Setting Changes:</size>
- Added Role Icon on Role Tab toggle.
- Added Rainbow color as Fortegreen toggle.
<size=105%>Chat Changes:</size>
- When a player is kicked for missing a mod, the host is now properly notified.
- Lobby Rules Messages are now titled "Lobby Rules," instead of "System".
- Added /info command for roles with meeting info. (PR #142)
<size=105%>Other Improvements:</size>
- More roles have role banners in the game options pane.
- More role and modifier icons have been redrawn in a higher quality.

News.Title: It wasn't me Officer, I swear!
News.SubTitle: - Said the Egotist
Text: Finally, Mira is updated to v1.6.0! Thanks for sticking around even when the mod has been in some bad trouble in terms of bugs. Unfortunately, this release isn't fully bugfree, but many other bugs have been fixed for good.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.6.0>TOU Mira v1.6.0 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Known Bugs:</size>
- Private chats are invisible to players killed mid-meeting.
- Private chats for living players get deleted when a new public chat message is added.
- Controlled players (via Parasite/Puppeteer) appear to be stuck in a walk cycle when they are walking onto a wall, showing they are under control.
- Neutral Wildcard may duplicate the amount of each neutral present if any selected slots are wildcards.
- Ghostwalkers are sometimes unable to use the Zipline, Platform, or Ladders.
- When Haunter finishes their tasks, sometimes the Impostors will not get an arrow to the Haunter, essentially screwing them over.
<size=105%>Known Hide and Seek Bugs:</size>
- The Seeker is missing animations for the hiders
- Hiders ignore their vent uses
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Medic can no longer hand out shields again when settings forbid them.
- Medic shields are destroyed properly if the setting is set.
- Re-applying Magic Mirrors immediately no longer breaks.
- Guardian Angel's protection is properly checked.
- Engineer can no longer bypass Plumber's Barricades.
- Operative and Sentry's Portable cameras are now functioning on Android.
- Medium properly hides pets when anonymous players are enabled.
- Monarch can properly knight regardless of the First Round Use setting.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Shapeshifter's name is properly changed.
- Parasite victims properly die when the time runs out.
- Hypnotist's Hysteria can no longer softlock the player upon death.
- Warlock's Burst Kill works again.
- Herbalist's herbs reset properly across rounds.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- First-Round settings no longer interfere with Amnesiac
- Spectre can spook properly again.
- Fairy can no longer target Neutral Outliers.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- When Crewpostor replaces a real Impostor, the player being replaced gets a proper role.
- Spectators that join without running /spec are no longer half-dead.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Current Region is now displayed in the lobby.
- Trapper's feedback now includes Hyperlinks.
- Many game settings are re-organized
- April Fools mode is temporarily removed from the main menu for the sake of stability.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Egotist and Crewpostor labels are shortened on player names.
- The Wiki now allows searching by faction / alignment.
- Disconnected players are properly kept displayed in the meeting and in the end game summary.
- Camo Comms, Mix-Up, and Vent System checks are far more optimized now, reducing lagspikes and general instability.
- Plumber now has a Flush duration, blocking any vents in use for a set duration.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Cleaned bodies can now be set to display as Missing, Disconnected, or Dead, applicable to Viper, Rotting, Chef, and Janitor.
- Kill Animation background can now optionally be colored based on the killer's Faction or Role Color.
- Added Role List Bucket tooltips while hovering (PR #156 by Maxi0fc)
- Investigator footprints can now be set to be based on Distance or Time.
- New Crewmate Killing role has been added: Officer.

News.Title: I vote, therefore I Mayor
News.SubTitle: The Mayor is jubilant as ever, look at him go!
Text: Finally, Mira is updated to v1.6.1! This build fixes quite a few issues, so we hope you enjoy. Many remaining bugs will be fixed in v1.7.0, as there will be a complete overhaul to systems in the background.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.6.1>TOU Mira v1.6.1 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Known Bugs:</size>
- Controlled players (via Parasite/Puppeteer) appear to be stuck in a walk cycle when they are walking onto a wall, showing they are under control.
- Neutral Wildcard may duplicate the amount of each neutral present if any selected slots are wildcards.
- Ghostwalkers are sometimes unable to use the Zipline, Platform, or Ladders.
- When Haunter finishes their tasks, sometimes the Impostors will not get an arrow to the Haunter, essentially screwing them over.
- Pets aren't removed based on settings properly.
- Medic Shield still doesn't get shattered properly with the settings.
<size=105%>Known Hide and Seek Bugs:</size>
- The Seeker is missing animations for the hiders
- Hiders ignore their vent uses
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Officer no longer breaks across game sessions.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Executioner Torment kills players again.
- Jester Haunt kills players again.
- Mercenary protection is removed upon their death.
- Arsonist interactions contribute towards the douse limit.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Grenadier flash no longer breaks kill screens and meetings.
- Dragging Viper / Rotting bodies no longer breaks Undertaker.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Impostor replaced by a Crewpostor can no longer see their previous task text.
- Camo Comms no longer shows other player names when revived.
- Doors can be set to Skeld doors or be flat out removed properly on Submerged.
- Private Chat is no longer broken.
- Players disconnecting from the lobby no longer breaks the player count.
- Disconnected players no longer leak their role color.
- Submerged and Level Impostor no longer break when loading base game map assets.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- dlekS tooltip in the Create Game Menu is legible now.
- Imitator now shows (Imi) next to their name while imitating roles.
- Zoom and Wiki buttons can be changed to be below or next to the Settings / Chat button.
- Amnesiac's Assassin configuration is improved.
- Lobby view pane has been adjusted to be smaller.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Keybind Actions are now available under the local settings, primarily for Android players.
- The host can now run /kick and /ban mid-game (PR #170 by VoidicChaos)
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Assassin is now shown as a modifier, unless Double Shot is present, with a better wiki description.
- Misguessing now shows who/what was attempted to be guessed in the end game summary (PR #173 by DivaniNL)

News.Title: Chat and Yap all your want
News.SubTitle: With more stability to go with it!
Text: Mira has now been updated once again, fixing crucial bugs and clearing up even more new-found bugs!
As a way to thank you all for sticking with us, maybe check out the goodies in the Pets tag, we're sure you'll enjoy it.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.6.2>TOU Mira v1.6.2 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Known Bugs:</size>
- Neutral Wildcard may duplicate the amount of each neutral present if any selected slots are wildcards.
- Ghostwalkers are sometimes unable to use the Zipline, Platform, or Ladders.
<size=105%>Known Hide n Seek Bugs:</size>
- The Seeker is missing animations for the hiders.
- Hiders ignore their vent uses.
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Medium's Spirit movement no longer carries over from Time Lord rewinds.
- Killers now get arrows that point to the Haunter when they complete their tasks.
- Medic no longer breaks when a player is protected by multiple Medics. Only one Medic will be flashed at a time.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Glitch no longer resets mimic cooldowns for other Glitches.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Venerer no longer displays its effects as "Visual" modifiers.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Changing the UI scale mid-game no longer breaks the UI at the top right.
- Chat messages are now capped to a maximum of 20 public and 20 private chat messages to prevent crashing.
- Roles are no longer revealed immediately upon death.
- Pets are removed based on settings properly.
- Celebrity's cause of death now displays all causes of death.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>

- Monarch will no longer be able to change their shield appearance, and is now always Grey. A future patch will allow further configuration, but not to the same degree as before with Warden / Cleric flashing.
- Seer can no longer compare revealed players.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- It is now possible to disable any host keybind if you tend to misclick.
- Survivor, Fairy, and 1st Round Shield protection will flash grey, as a way to not appear unresponsive.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Two custom pets have been added
- Game Mechanic Option: All Shields Flash Anonymously.
- Top-Right UI can now be scaled up and down.

News.Title: Play it your way.
News.SubTitle: With Mira OR Reactivated
Text: Mira has been updated for the latest release of Among Us, alongside TOU Reactivated!
You may now choose to use <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/Town-Of-Us-Reactivated/>TOU Reactivated</link> again if you so wish, but Mira will get major content updates, unlike Reactivated.
The Mira team really appreciates all of your support, thank you so much for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://github.com/AU-Avengers/TOU-Mira/releases/tag/1.6.3>TOU Mira v1.6.3 Download</link> ★ <link=https://au-avengers.github.io/docs.toum.gg/>Mod Guide & Details</link> ★
<size=105%>Crewmate Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Officer now sees Prosecutor as a valid killer.
- Monarch is no longer immune to basic interactions when they have a shield.
- Cleric Barrier duration is no longer tied to its cooldown.
- Warden no longer resets cooldowns to one second.
- Engineer and Plumber interact with vents in a more optimized fashion. (PR #190 by @TheDavSmasher)
- Plumber barricades prevent all venters from entering properly. (PR #192 by @TheDavSmasher)
- Sentry Cameras are no longer placed below the map.
<size=105%>Neutral Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Arsonist douse count is no longer more than intended.
- Executioner can no longer torment when their target becomes evil.
<size=105%>Impostor Role Bugfixes:</size>
- Shapeshifter now inherits fake shields on players, like how Morphling / Glitch do.
- Parasite and Puppeteer can interact with Ladders, Platforms, and Ziplines properly. (PR #176 by @DrFreezyYT)
- Pet Button no longer interferes with forced player map interactions.
<size=105%>Other Bugfixes:</size>
- Pets tab now says "Pets" rather than "Hats."
- Directly clicking on security utilities like Admin is no longer possible if task requirements aren't met.
- End Game Timer is no longer broken.
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Miner now places Polus vents and has an animation paired with it.
- By default, Sonar now uses Heartbeats instead of arrows to keep track of players.
- Haunter now marks players with a dark red name when they are revealed.
<size=105%>Improvements:</size>
- Glitch, Morphling, and Swooper now have better vent settings.
- UI changes are far more optimized now.
- Destroyed animations are now cleared from memory properly.
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- TOU Mira: Legacy is now a part of the main mod.
- Role Name placement is now configurable in terms of size and position.
- Added configurable mod stamp placement.
- Added "TV Show" style for Skeld visuals.
